# Arghya Bhattacharjee - Complete Professional Profile

## Personal Information
- **Full Name**: Arghya Bhattacharjee
- **Role**: Software Engineer, MERN Stack Developer, Full Stack Engineer
- **Website**: https://www.arghya.tech/
- **Email**: arghyabhattacharjee876@gmail.com

- **Facebook**: https://www.facebook.com/arghya.bhattacharjee876
- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/arghya.bhattacharjee876/

## Education & Qualifications
- **Degree**: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) in Information Technology
- **Specialization**: MERN Stack, Full Stack Web Development, Artificial Intelligence, IoT Systems

## Patents & Innovations
- **Patent Title**: AI-based LPG Gas Leakage Detection & Fire Alert System
- **Role**: Co-Inventor / Developer
- **Domain**: Artificial Intelligence, IoT Safety Systems, Real-Time Sensor Processing

## Comprehensive Technical Stack
- **Frontend Technologies**: React.js, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), Responsive Web Design
- **Backend Technologies**: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, Python
- **Database Systems**: MongoDB, MySQL, Firebase
- **Version Control & DevOps**: Git, GitHub, Vercel Deployment, CI/CD Workflow
- **Computer Vision & Hardware**: OpenCV, Python Computer Vision, Arduino IDE, ESP8266, ESP32, IoT Sensors

## Full Portfolio Projects
1. **NovaCart E-Commerce**: Full-stack MERN e-commerce application featuring responsive UI, shopping cart state management, user authentication, and product catalog filtering.
2. **Little Guardian**: AI and IoT-driven child monitoring system integrating sensor hardware and real-time alert dispatch.
3. **Face Obstruction Detection**: Python computer vision model using OpenCV to detect facial obstruction and automatically trigger WhatsApp alerts.
4. **Face Emotion Recognition**: Machine learning system analyzing facial expressions in real-time video streams.
